features: "Black Magic" by Chongz 20cm Acrylic Bong With its mysterious, matte black finish and minimalist aesthetics, the "Black Magic" is as visually stunning as it is functional. It’s the perfect addition to any collection.
PLEASE NOTE **** This listing is for various shapes/colours ***** Designs vary but all have top performance Perfectly sized for both portability and table use
A very affordable and durable protable acrylic bong - Matte black with iconic Chongz branding
This product is not intended for use with illegal substances
Contains no tobacco Contains no nicotine
description: Elevate your sessions with the Chongz Acrylic "Black Magic" Waterpipe. Designed for portability and convenience, this 20cm acrylic pipe delivers smooth hits and easy handling. Its lightweight yet durable build ensures longevity, making it ideal for casual and frequent use. With a sleek black finish and practical design, it’s a perfect balance of style and functionality. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced enthusiast, the "Black Magic" offers a seamless experience for all.
